expectations.text: Treats this as a marketing messaging task and delivers concrete talking points or hooks
expectations.evidence: Delivers three usable one-line pitches; does not gate it as a positioning exercise.

expectations.text: Provides at least 3 distinct angles or one-line pitches
expectations.evidence: Three labeled angles: guilt-relief, effortless, identity.

expectations.text: Frames at least one around the reader's problem or desired outcome, not the app's features
expectations.evidence: Angle 1 leads with 'stop killing them'; explicit advice to name the feeling not the feature.

expectations.text: Avoids vague filler adjectives in the suggested phrasing
expectations.evidence: Pitches use concrete images (jungle apartment, ten seconds a week), not 'amazing/innovative'.

expectations.text: States an assumption about the target audience in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening 'Assuming: audience = casual houseplant owners who keep killing plants.'
